title: Recruitment for a Service Desk Operator
body: "We have a vacancy for a Service Desk Operator.  Job Title  Service Desk Operator  Grade  AO  Salary & Pension  £29,770 per annum with Pension Scheme  Annual Leave entitlement  Commencing at 25 days  Role  The IT Service Desk Operator serves as the first point of contact for IT support, delivering prompt and professional assistance to users via digital channels, phone, and in person.  Key responsibilities include managing and monitoring the IT Service Desk system, categorising and escalating issues, and ensuring timely resolution.  How to apply  You must make your application via Service Desk Operator - Civil Service Jobs - GOV.UK where you will find a full job description.  Closing Date  12 January 2026 "
